Perimeter.description: Planar curve defining the edges at center of the Stem. ICurve: The interface for all one-dimensional geometrical objects.

ThicknessTop.description: Thickness at the top of the Stem.

ThicknessBottom.description: Thickness at the bottom of the Stem.

Normal.description: Normal to the surface of the Stem denoting the direction of the retained face. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Material.description: Structural material of the property. IMaterialFragment: Base interface for structural materials used by structural properties or as a fragment of the physical material.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
